name: cost_budget_dry_run
description: Demonstrates max_cost_usd. Dry-run only because not every agent emits cost: cursor and gemini do not, while claude-code and codex do. To enable, run with --agent claude-code (or another cost-emitting agent) without --dry-run; the scorer will compare TurnOutput.cost_usd against the cap.

turns.message: What is 7 + 8? Reply with just the number.
